creator: deuza@fr.FreeBSD.org
text:
On http://www.freebsd.org/fr/index.html all links in "Documentation" block is invalid (and maybe some others)

The links for the localized handbook by exemple is :
http://www.freebsd.org/fr/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/

The right link is :
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/fr_FR.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/index.html

How-To-Repeat: Go to localized index and choose a link in Documentation
